title: Chilli Orange Roasted Feta & Fennel Grain Bowl
summary: A vibrant and flavourful grain bowl with roasted feta, pickled fennel, and a citrusy yoghurt dressing. This dish is packed with textures and bold flavours, perfect for a satisfying meal.

method.description: Tear your feta into 2cm-sized chunks. Thinly slice the red chilli, zest half the orange and segment the whole. Thinly slice the fennel and pick the leaves from the mint.
Place the feta on an oiled baking tray, drizzle with olive oil, and roast for 10-15 minutes until golden.
Now for the dressing. In a bowl, combine the shallots, orange segments, chilli, and sherry vinegar. Season with salt and let sit to pickle.
In another bowl, toss the pecans, mint leaves, cooked grains, lentils, and fennel with half the orange dressing.
In a small bowl, mix the yoghurt with the orange zest, a drizzle of olive oil, salt, and black pepper. Stir and set aside.
Stir the cumin seeds and honey into the remaining orange dressing. Once the feta is golden, pour this dressing over the feta and return to the oven for another 10-15 minutes until caramelised.
Divide the grain mixture into serving boxes and top with the chilli orange roasted feta. Finish with a dollop of orange yoghurt. Refrigerate until needed—no need to reheat before serving.

tips: Storage: Store in airtight containers in the fridge for up to 3 days. Serve cold.
Substitutions: Swap feta for halloumi or use kale instead of fennel. Replace pecans with walnuts, almonds, or pumpkin seeds.
Serving Ideas: Pair with grilled chicken or serve as a standalone salad for a hearty vegetarian meal.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
